channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Thousands of CEOs just admitted AI had no impact on employment or productivity—and it has economists resurrecting a paradox from 40 years ago
item.description: In the 1980s, economist Robert Solow made an observation that reminded economists of today’s AI boom: “You can see the computer age everywhere but in ...

item.title: CFO Inertia To Cost Brands 34% Of Profits By 2030, Says Climate Report
item.description: The report projects a 3% climate-cost shock that could erase a third of profits, and high-risk scenarios could push losses to 67%, urging fashion bran...

item.title: Trump touts potential 20% tax refunds from 'Big Beautiful Bill'
item.description: President Donald Trump said tax refunds could exceed 20% this year thanks to his "One Big Beautiful Bill," eliminating taxes on tips, Social Security ...

item.title: Ray Dalio warns of ‘great disorder’ period for world economy, marked by ‘clash of great powers’—just like the 1930s
item.description: The billionaire hedge fund manager warned that the world has entered a historical cycle that he believes is the most turbulent and violent possible.

item.title: Anthropic was supposed to be a ‘safe’ alternative to OpenAI, but CEO Dario Amodei admits his company struggles to balance safety with profits
item.description: Anthropic’s CEO says intense commercial pressure is testing the company’s safety-first AI mission.

item.title: Salmon sold at BJ’s Wholesale Club recalled over potential listeria contamination
item.description: The FDA announced a recall of Wellsley Farms Farm-Raised Atlantic Salmon sold at BJ's locations in seven states due to potential listeria contaminatio...

item.title: LEGO Drops New McLaren To Celebrate 2025 F1 Champ, And It Looks Great
item.description: LEGO has really gone all-in with its F1 range, but its latest release, the Technic McLaren MCL39, shows how far its designers have come.

item.title: Companies are cycling through CEOs—and replacing them with first-timers
item.description: The year of the rookie CEO has arrived.

item.title: ‘Operation Pawpulation’ Founder Urges Public To Spay And Neuter Pets
item.description: Spay and Neuter Awareness Month highlights the benefits of spaying and neutering cats and dogs, from reducing overpopulation to providing health and b...

item.title: Goldman Sachs to drop DEI board standards as Trump's anti-woke campaign spreads across corporate America
item.description: Goldman Sachs reportedly plans to drop DEI language from board criteria after conservative pressure, marking another corporate retreat from DEI progra...

item.title: $56 trillion national debt leading to a spiraling crisis: Budget watchdog warns the U.S. is walking a crumbling path
item.description: Trump is putting the U.S. economy on a "sugar high" and leaving other people holding the bill when it comes due a decade from now, according to the CR...

item.title: Federal fraud is double previous estimates, LexisNexis Risk Solutions CEO says
item.description: The federal government is hemorrhaging about $1 trillion per year due to fraud, CEO of LexisNexis Special Services & LexisNexis Risk Solutions Governm...

item.title: Legal AI Startup Legora Eyes $400 Million Raise At $5 Billion-Plus Valuation
item.description: As investors double down on the promise of automating legal work, the company is in talks to raise $400 million following two rounds in late 2025.

item.title: Top 5 Renewable Energy Sources Reshaping The Global Economy In 2026
item.description: Solar, wind, hydro, geothermal and bioenergy are reshaping global power systems. Here’s how they work and what 2025 data reveals.

item.title: Has Paramount pulled its bid for Warner Bros. Discovery back from the brink?
Don't Short Yourself: This is the smart way to use AI to do your taxes
Dow, Nasdaq and S&P 500 gaining in final hour; gold and silver decline — live
Rivian’s stock just had its best day ever. This analyst says it’s time to sell.
Stop watching gold’s daily swings and get ready for a $10,000 supercycle
Americans see bigger tax refunds so far this year as filing season begins at a slower pace
item.description: Americans are getting bigger tax refunds this year, with average refunds jumping to $2,290 - up 10.9% from last year, according to the latest IRS data...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
